---
title: "Programme"
---

The programme will be updated as speakers and sessions are confirmed.

## Day 1 — 26 November 2026

| Time | Activity |
|---|---|
| 09:00–09:30 | Registration |
| 09:30–11:00 | Lecture for students |
| 11:00–12:30 | Academic meeting |
| 12:30–13:45 | Acedemic lunch |
| 13:45–14:00 | Coffee break |
| 14:00–16:00 | Session 1 |
| 16:00–16:15 | Coffee break |
| 16:15–18:15 | Session 2 |
| 19:30 | Workshop's dinner |

## Day 2 — 2 November 2026

| Time | Activity |
|---|---|
| 09:00–09:30 | Coffee |
| 09:30–11:00 | Session 3 |
| 11:00–11:15 | Coffee break |
| 11:15–12:45 | Session 4 |
| 12:45–14:30 | Lunch |
| 14:30–16:00 | Closing remarks |
